project_type: Self-evolving AI development kernel - Python project with kernel execution loop, knowledge management, and evolution engine
build_system: pip with requirements.txt, pyenv for version management
test_framework: pytest with pytest-cov, uses tmp_path fixtures and conftest.py shared fixtures
build_command: eval "$(pyenv init -)" && pyenv shell 3.12.13 && python -m pytest tests/ --tb=short -q
test_command: eval "$(pyenv init -)" && pyenv shell 3.12.13 && python -m pytest tests/ --cov=. --cov-report=term-missing --tb=short -q
verification_instructions: Run pytest with coverage, verify 183+ tests pass and coverage >= 90%
setup_instructions: eval "$(pyenv init -)" && pyenv shell 3.12.13 && pip install pyyaml pytest pytest-cov
environment_constraints: Must use pyenv shell 3.12.13 prefix for all python commands. No network needed for tests.
contribution_requirements: Tests must pass. Coverage >= 90%. Constitution immutable files must remain protected. Commit after each round.
key_patterns: All source in kernel/, knowledge/, memory/. Tests in tests/. Uses YAML for state/graph/indexes, JSONL for history/decisions. StateManager handles persistence. GraphExecutor handles workflow. EvolutionEngine handles mutations with immutable protections. SkillComposer combines skills.
directory_structure: Root: runner.py (entry point), kernel/ (graph, state, evolution, philosophy, prompts, constitution), knowledge/ (store, skill_composer, skills/, rules/, patterns/), memory/ (state_manager, decisions, progress), tests/ (all test files)
